issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: real-time-todo-list
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers most rubric items (schema, index, auth‑guarded mutation, query, React hooks), while Response A omits key details like the index, correct field names, and proper auth usage.

scenarios.name: file-upload-and-cleanup
scenarios.rationale: Both responses omit the required owner, path, and uploadedAt fields and fail to validate user identity, so they score similarly low.
